name: Data transformation tutorial: code step examples
description: Adapted from the n8n expressions tutorial. Demonstrates various code step transformations (string manipulation, array operations, date formatting, object restructuring) and posts a comprehensive reference guide to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Learn n8n expressions with an interactive step-by-step tutorial for beginners

focusArea.description: Focus area: all, strings, arrays, dates, objects, math
